text:
私は多くの新人を見てきているが
己にうぬぼれず、最後まで
任務を全うした者はそれほど多くない。

謙虚な姿勢で頂点を極め
私の記憶に鮮烈な衝撃を

I've seen plenty of rookies in my day, but not
many have seen their missions through to the
end without falling victim to conceit.

Perfect your skills with due humility and leave
a positive impression on me that
I'm sure to remember.
